fullArticle:
All products featured on Vogue are independently selected by our editors. However, we may earn affiliate revenue on this article and commission when you buy something.

It’s no secret that everything ’90s is back for summer 2026. Whether it’s the minimalist midi dress or a sleek black handbag, the era’s pared-back ethos feels more desirable than ever—we largely have Sarah Pidgeon’s portrayal of Carolyn Bessette-Kennedy in Love Story to thank for the resurgence.

But those staples aren’t the only comeback worth noting—capri pants are firmly back this season, too. According to Vogue’s Laura Hawkins, “calves are the new erogenous zone.” The runways have given their seal of approval—from Khaite to Jacquemus to Colleen Allen—with the street style set close behind.
